name: pds-devops-ci-demo
description: Demo Node service for CI/CD pipeline exercise (no deployments).

scripts.package:artifact: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const out='dist'; if(!fs.existsSync(out)) fs.mkdirSync(out); const pkg=require('./package.json'); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(out,'build-info.json'), JSON.stringify({name:pkg.name, version:pkg.version, sha: process.env.GITHUB_SHA || null, builtAt: new Date().toISOString()}, null, 2)); console.log('Wrote dist/build-info.json');"
